visual.name: DateRangeSlicer
visual.description: Advanced date range slicer with preset buttons for quick selection. Features dual calendar view, exclude today option, and customizable colors. Perfect for selecting date ranges in your Power BI reports.

highlightColor.description: Color for selected items, buttons, and checkboxes

rangeColor.description: Color for selected date ranges in calendar

hoverColor.description: Color for hover states on buttons and calendar dates

strokeColor.description: Color for all borders and divider lines

inputBackground.description: Start/End date input, Cancel button, and Exclude today background

textColor.description: Main text color throughout the visual

fontFamily.description: Font family for all text in the visual

headerFontSize.description: Font size for date input labels

dateInputFontSize.description: Font size for selected date display

presetButtonFontSize.description: Font size for preset buttons (Today, Last week, etc)

calendarMonthFontSize.description: Font size for calendar month headers

calendarDayFontSize.description: Font size for calendar date numbers

weekdayFontSize.description: Font size for weekday labels (Sun, Mon, etc)
